name: Workspace Search Bar
notes: SearchBar is a controlled form component that holds its own local query state (useState); it does NOT read from or write to the Redux store directly.
Submitting an empty or whitespace-only query is silently ignored — SearchBar's handleSubmit guards with query.trim() and never calls onSearch.

App.jsx routes the onSearch callback to DocumentGrid via an imperative ref (this.documentGridRef.handleSearch), bypassing Redux entirely; the actual HTTP call is made inside DocumentGrid, not SearchBar.
The component is rendered only when the user is authenticated; App.jsx returns <LoginForm /> unconditionally if isAuthenticated is false, so SearchBar is never mounted for unauthenticated users.
